channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Forget LinkedIn—Amazon’s Andy Jassy started a chicken wing eating club to network when he first moved to Seattle for work
item.description: Before the Amazon C-suite, Andy Jassy was hosting weekly chicken wing nights to network with his peers—a lesson for Gen Z in the power of genuine conn...

item.title: Garmin Cirqa: Everything Known About The Whoop Rival So Far
item.description: It may just be weeks away, and the Garmin Cirqa represents a new style of more lifestyle-friendly wearable for the hardcore fitness brand.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers (#1049)
item.description: Looking for today's NYT Connections hints? Some help and the answers for today's game are right here to help keep your streak alive.

item.title: ‘This is very transformative for the business’: Lyft’s head of growth on taking a big step into London’s black cab sector
item.description: The ride-hailing giant has agreed to acquire Gett UK, making it the largest app for London's iconic black cabs. Lyft's EVP for global growth, an Arsen...

item.title: Gen Alpha can’t write emails to grandma without ChatGPT. It’s time for a ‘Digital Harm Tax’
item.description: I nearly lost my own life to social media. Phone bans and lawsuits aren't enough.

item.title: Quordle Hints Today: Saturday, April 25 Clues And Answers
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Meta executive says he only gets stressed five times a year and that it’s actually a ‘useful signal’
item.description: Meta’s chief technology officer Andrew Bosworth says being busy with important matters on the table is his stress “trigger”—he calms down with exercis...

item.title: You Can't Paddle Into A 100-Foot Wave. You Can't Incrementally Adopt AI, Either.
item.description: Big wave surfers didn't ride 60-foot waves by paddling harder — they invented tow-in surfing. Enterprise AI adoption requires the same categorical shi...

item.title: A Big Update About ‘Running Point’ Season 3 On Netflix
item.description: Will Running Point get a season 3? There's an update on that front from the showrunner, now that season 2 is here.

item.title: Mythos access by Discord group reveals real danger of AI-powered hacking
item.description: The unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model wasn't just a breach.

item.title: The ‘simple math’ why oil prices need to rise a lot more, according to JPMorgan
Why Intel’s stock is on track for a historic surge after earnings
Stocks open mixed as Middle East conflicts and oil drive Friday trades
Economic calendar: Friday's data focuses on consumer sentiment
Gas prices may still be too low for Trump to give ground on Iran right now
Bessent torches Democrat's ‘sanctions relief’ claims, calls $14B Iran/Russia charge a DNC talking point
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Chris Coons clash over claims that Iran gained $14 billion from temporary U.S. sanctions relief on oil.

item.title: Who is Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair?
item.description: President Donald Trump nominated former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh at the end of January to become chairman of the central bank.

item.title: Trump says he wants 'somebody' to buy Spirit Airlines, opposes United-American merger
item.description: President Donald Trump says he wants someone to buy Spirit Airlines as the low-cost carrier battles bankruptcy and rising fuel costs threaten its reco...

item.title: How does Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh view the central bank's inflation goal?
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is testifying before the Senate Banking Committee and has previously signaled support for a range-based approach to infl...

item.title: DOJ reportedly pursuing criminal antitrust probe of major meatpacking companies
item.description: The DOJ is reportedly investigating four major beef companies in a criminal antitrust probe after Trump claimed meatpackers manipulated cattle prices.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
